user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Coffee Break at Cafe near AGO
fields.description: Relaxing coffee break at a nearby cafe before visiting the Art Gallery of Ontario.

insertion_point.reasoning: The coffee break is scheduled between the end of the Stakeholder Presentation at 11:00 AM and the start of the Art Gallery of Ontario visit at 12:00 PM. Position 2 places it directly between these two activities.
